entries.title: Spellbook Raises $50m Series B led by Khosla Ventures
entries.snippet: Today we’re announcing our Series B financing led by Keith Rabois at Khosla Ventures, including participation from Threshold Ventures, Inovia, Bling Capital and Moxxie Ventures.

entries.title: Spellbook’s Academic Partner Program Launches with 50+ Law Schools
AI in Legal Departments: 2025 Benchmarking Report
entries.snippet: AI is no longer a future topic for legal departments. It’s reshaping how legal teams get work done today.

entries.title: Announcing Spellbook's SOC 2 Compliance
entries.snippet: We’re proud to announce that Spellbook has achieved SOC 2 Type II compliance. This milestone reinforces our commitment to security, privacy, and trust—ensuring legal teams can confidently rely on our suite of AI tools.

entries.title: 2025 AI and Law Predictions: Spellbook Insights
entries.snippet: Scott Stevenson predicts AI's impact on legaltech by 2025: AI colleagues, personalization, and industry consolidation. Discover the future of legal technology.

entries.title: How o1 Is Transforming Legal AI Workflows
entries.snippet: OpenAI's o1 model revolutionizes Legal AI with enhanced document revision, legal calculations, and comprehensive agent workflows.

entries.title: Introducing Spellbook: AI Legal Assistant for Lawyers
entries.snippet: Launch of Spellbook Associate: The first AI agent for lawyers, revolutionizing legal AI. Discover the next generation of legal technology today!

entries.title: Spellbook Secures $10.9M to Enhance AI Tools for Lawyers
entries.snippet: $10.9M raised to enhance legal professionals with Assistive AI. Discover how our innovative solutions are transforming the legal industry.

entries.title: Using Spellbook: Crafting Email Contract Summaries
entries.snippet: Discover how startup lawyer Chris Brown utilizes Spellbook to efficiently summarize contracts for clients, enhancing legal services and client satisfaction.

entries.title: Free Spellbook Access for Law Schools Now Available
entries.snippet: Spellbook is now free for law schools worldwide—empowering students and faculty with AI tools to enhance legal education and prepare for an AI-driven future.

entries.title: GitHub Copilot's Impact on Legal Professionals
entries.snippet: AI-powered lawyering is transforming legal workflows, promising efficiency beyond email and search. Discover how legal tech is finally delivering on its potential.

entries.title: Spellbook Secures $20M After 10x Revenue Surge & Global Growth
entries.snippet: Spellbook secures major funding from Inovia Capital, boosting growth and doubling total investment. Discover how this impacts the company's future.

entries.title: Faster, Smarter Playbooks
entries.snippet: Add fallbacks, build from model docs, and generate powerful rules with AI.

entries.title: Introducing Library & Smart Clause Drafting
entries.snippet: The foundation for AI that drafts and reviews like you do.

entries.title: Contract Prompt Library
entries.snippet: Pick from ready-to-use prompts, discover features in context, and get helpful follow-ups as you go.
